description: State-conditional field invariants for the Proposal domain dataclass (src/will/autonomy/proposal.py). ProposalStateManager is the runtime enforcement site; this contract makes its invariants constitutionally visible and auditable. Authority: ADR-056 D4. The allOf/if/then blocks declare which fields are mandatory at each ProposalStatus value; the current AST gate validates field presence (class declaration conformance only) — runtime value enforcement remains with ProposalStateManager and the DB CHECK constraints (ADR-015 D2/D6). The AutonomousProposal ORM class shares field names but adds ORM-only columns (id, claimed_by, version, updated_at) that are not declared on the domain dataclass and therefore not governed by this contract.

goal.description: Human-readable statement of intent. What this Proposal will achieve.

actions.description: One or more ProposalAction declarations. Each carries action_id, parameters, and order.

scope.description: Files and domains this Proposal may touch (ProposalScope). IntentGuard enforces write boundaries against this declaration.

risk.description: Risk assessment: overall_risk, action_risks, risk_factors, mitigation (RiskAssessment | None). Null before risk computation completes at creation time.

status.description: Current lifecycle status. Governed vocabulary: proposal_status enum in .intent/META/enums.json. Valid values: draft, pending, approved, executing, completed, failed, rejected.

created_by.description: Identity of the Worker that created this Proposal.

validation_checks.description: Constitutional validation checks performed at creation time.

validation_results.description: Per-check validation outcomes keyed by check name.

execution_started_at.description: When execution began (datetime | None). Populated on transition to executing.

execution_completed_at.description: When execution ended (datetime | None). Populated on transition to completed or failed.

execution_results.description: Per-action results keyed by action_id. Populated after execution attempt.

constitutional_constraints.description: Evidence of the constitutional basis for this Proposal. Carries finding_ids and related consequence-chain attribution (ADR-019, ADR-017).

approval_required.description: Whether human approval is required before execution. Derived from risk.overall_risk at creation: safe → false, moderate/high → true.

approved_by.description: Identity of the approver (str | None). Non-null when status is approved, executing, or completed. Paired with approval_authority.

approved_at.description: Approval timestamp (datetime | None). Non-null when status is approved, executing, or completed.

approval_authority.description: Constitutional authority under which approval was granted (str | None). Non-omittable when status is approved, executing, or completed. Governed vocabulary: proposal_approval_authority enum in .intent/META/enums.json. ADR-015 D2/D6.

failure_reason.description: Human-readable failure explanation (str | None). Non-null when status is failed. Terminal state.

allOf.description: APPROVED: approval_authority, approved_by, and approved_at must be non-null. Enforced by ProposalStateManager.approve() and DB CHECK constraint (ADR-015 D2/D6).
EXECUTING: all APPROVED invariants hold; execution_started_at must be non-null. claimed_by is enforced at the ORM layer only (AutonomousProposal.claimed_by) — not a Proposal dataclass field.
COMPLETED: all APPROVED invariants hold; execution_completed_at must be non-null. Terminal status.
FAILED: failure_reason must be non-null. Terminal status. ConsumerWorker must revive all Findings linked via constitutional_constraints.finding_ids by resetting status to open (CORE-Proposal.md §8a).
